pr.title: Loop Runner v1: bounded gap→queue→chain→evidence→re-queue cycles (A1)
pr.description:
## Summary

First closed autonomous loop: `axiom loop-run --cycles N` wires the existing engines end-to-end so the factory spins without a human queueing each step. Per cycle:

1. **Gap analysis** — `SelfModelBuilder` + `SelfModelGapAnalyzer` over the live repo self-model (in-memory graph payload; no manual `self-model-build` prerequisite)
2. **Work queue** — `WorkQueueEngine.create()` with the executable chain-run item (high priority) plus the top-5 ranked gap recommendations (gap priority → queue priority)
3. **Execute** — `ExecutionChainOrchestrator.run()` (full Plan→…→Report id flow)
4. **Evidence apply** — `EvidencePromotionLoop.apply()` on the produced `evidence.json` (BHV-036 ladder + BHV-037 damping apply as normal)
5. **Re-queue** — follow-up items derived from the intake decision: accepted → normal-priority "re-validate" item; rejected/quarantined → high-priority "investigate" item

Safety/doctrine properties:
- **Strictly bounded**: `cycles` capped at `MAX_LOOP_CYCLES = 10`; `--cycles 0`/negative rejected.
- **Stops on the first chain failure** (recorded as `chain_error`, loop status `failed`, CLI exits 1).
- **No new object model, nothing upstream mutated** — every stage is the existing engine producing its normal artifacts; the loop report (`artifacts/loop_runner/<loop_id>/report.json` + `pass_fail.json`) just links the real ids of every stage of every cycle (queue_report_id, chain_run_id + all 7 chain ids, intake_id, evidence decision, updated state, requeue_report_id). Persistence uses the existing `is_within_sandbox` guard.

New module `src/axiom_core/loop_runner.py` (~200 lines), CLI `loop-run`, command registry entry (READ_ONLY/SAFE, 600s), `EXPECTED_AXIOM_COMMANDS` updated.

**Stacked on #69** (merge order: #68 → #69 → this).

Real run on this repo, 2 cycles: both PASS + accepted, `state_changed=true` each cycle (evidence mass accumulating on the damped curve), 11 gaps / 170 modules queued per cycle, distinct queue/re-queue reports per cycle.

What did NOT change: orchestrator, promotion loop, gap analyzer, work-queue engine semantics.

Tests (tier 2, targeted): `tests/test_loop_runner.py` — full-stage linkage, persisted loop report, 2-cycle evidence accumulation, cycle bounds, synthetic chain-failure stop, queue/re-queue item derivation, CLI JSON + bound rejection (9 tests); `tests/test_command_registry.py` 27 passed; ruff clean. Skill `testing-execution-chain` updated in the same PR.

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/8ad1c9ac0d2f4252bb77647f1eabaac7
Requested by: @plamen-dev
